epic.title: Refactor Dashboard UI: Admin Components
epic.description: Migrating the Liferay Tunnel admin dashboard subdomains, users, and settings views from a monolithic vanilla HTML/JS implementation to a React + Vite SPA.

issues.title: Phase 4.4: Admin Subdomains and Users Tables
issues.description: Implement the `/admin/subdomains` and `/admin/users` views in the React SPA. This includes fetching active leases, rendering interactive data tables, and integrating administrative actions (kick, approve, promote, suspend).
